entries.title: plan(w01): Production proof and runtime closeout

implementationProof.note: W01 repo-side generated workstream is closed; live deployment proof remains tracked by #137 and #141 through #145.
GitHub App issue sync live preflight makes the stable URL, workflow state, runtime config, Render service, and Blueprint blockers machine-checkable.
Release closeout evidence now requires the GitHub App sync preflight gate before live sync proof can close.
Latest tracker evidence refresh is merged into origin/main before final production-proof audit.
Workflow dependency update is merged and validated on origin/main without changing the live production blockers.
Final blocker audit evidence refresh is merged and validated on origin/main without changing the live production blockers.
Post-merge blocker evidence refresh is merged and validated on origin/main without changing the live production blockers.

evidence.note: Stable provider target and HTTPS ingress remain blocked externally; latest blocker refresh is issue comment 4504609146.
Runtime GitHub App config, stable repo sync URL, active workflow, and deployed fail-closed auth proof remain blocked; latest blocker refresh is issue comment 4504610449.
Target Postgres, db:migrate, db:status --require-ready, and shared-auth readiness proof remain blocked; latest blocker refresh is issue comment 4504612149.
Deployed worker service, shared durable state, and job claim/settlement proof remain blocked; latest blocker refresh is issue comment 4504613320.

Merged preflight currently fails because the sync URL is temporary, the workflow is disabled, Render services are absent, and Blueprint validation returns need_payment_info; latest blocker refresh is issue comment 4504614955.

Latest roadmap evidence refresh at issue comment 4504616601 records current origin/main, release/remediation validation, live preflight collection, and remaining external deployment/runtime prerequisites.
Post-PR #877 main CI passed on origin/main dd7a28e; repo-side validation is green while deployment proof remains blocked.
Post-PR #903 main CI passed on origin/main 75b13ba; repo-side validation is green while deployment proof remains blocked.
Post-PR #904 main CI passed on origin/main 9bfdb8f; repo-side validation is green while deployment proof remains blocked.

Final live preflight from a clean origin/main worktree still fails on temporary ingress, disabled workflow, missing runtime config, missing smoke key, missing allowlist, absent Render services, and need_payment_info.

Post-PR #903 live preflight from a clean origin/main worktree still fails on temporary ingress, disabled workflow, missing runtime config, missing smoke key, missing allowlist, absent Render services, and need_payment_info.

Post-PR #904 live preflight from a clean origin/main worktree still fails on temporary ingress, disabled workflow, missing runtime config, missing smoke key, missing allowlist, absent Render services, and need_payment_info.
Stable ingress issue was reopened after accidental keyword closure; no deployed health or readiness proof exists yet.

residualRisks.title: Production-like deployment evidence remains unavailable until provider target setup completes.
residualRisks.mitigation: Keep #137/#141-#146 open and treat local CI as implementation evidence only.
